title: AppVersionParameter
content:
# AppVersionParameter


## Properties

- **app_name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` of the App in the App Registry linked to this Parameter.
- **app_version** (`string`): Version number of the App in the App Registry linked to this Parameter.
- **comment** (`string`): Latest information from user when creating or updating this Parameter.
- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Parameter was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **name** (`string`): The name of the Parameter.
- **resource** (`string`): KRN of the Asset associated with the Parameter.
- **value** (`any`): Value represented in one of these formats.
- **created_at** (`string`): UTC time when the object was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): KRN of the user or process that created the object.
- **updated_at** (`string`): UTC time when any keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): KRN of the user or process that last updated any of the keys.
summary: Object with properties: app_name, app_version, comment, created, name

app_name.description: Unique identifier `name` of the App in the App Registry linked to this Parameter.

app_version.description: Version number of the App in the App Registry linked to this Parameter.

comment.description: Latest information from user when creating or updating this Parameter.

created.description: UTC time when the Parameter was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

resource.description: KRN of the Asset associated with the Parameter.

value.description: Value represented in one of these formats.

created_at.description: UTC time when the object was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: KRN of the user or process that created the object.

updated_at.description: UTC time when any keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: KRN of the user or process that last updated any of the keys.
